titleStmt.title: SII 15.524: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 524. (B.K. No. 72 of 1929-30.) TUMBIGI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone built in the left side of the northern gateway of the village.

This is dated Śaka 936, Ānanda, Mārggaśira-Amāvāsye, Tuesday, Vriśchikasañkrānti. On the said tithi occurred Dhanus-sankrānti, when the weekday was Thursday. If, however, the month was Kārtika, the details would regularly correspond to 1014 A.D., October 26.
It records a gift of land to the Bāṇarāsi-maṭha by Nāgadēvayya, the Uroḍeya of the agrahāra of Tuṁbige in Pagalaṭṭi-Three Hundred. The gift was entrusted into the hands of the Hundred Mahājanas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sakanṛpakāḷātīta nāmadhēya saṁvatsa
936 neya Ānanda saṁvatsaraṁ pravarttisutumi
re tadvariṣābhyaṁtarada mārggaśira bahuḷa
māvāsya maṁgaḷavāraṁ nṛcchi�saṁkrāntiya
ndu pagalaṭṭi 300 ṟaṟa baḷiya tuṁbigeyagra
hārada Ūroḍeya nāgadēvayyaṁgaḷ tamma
mānyadoḷage paḍuvaṇa kaṭṭeyalu bā
ṇarāsiya maṭhakke koṭṭa keymatta 30
Ī dharmmamaṁ mahājana nūrvvaru Ācandrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ pratipāḷisuvarina ppa satrava
naḷidāta bāṇarāsiyoḷ pannirvva brā
hmaṇaruvaṁ panneraḍubhayamukhi kavilema
naḷida pātakaveyvugu . sāmānyōyaṁ
dharmmasētu nṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanī
yō bhavadbhi sarvvānētāṁ bhāgiṇa pārttivē
ndānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadra
sarvvadā pāḷanīyatrā bhūmi
yasya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya
tadā paḷaṁ svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harē
dharā ṣaṣṭi �pa �hasā �vi
yatē kṛmi . rēvaṇaṁyyaṁ bare�
Digital edition of SII 15.524 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
